entries.problemPattern: Async stream callback saves partial success when error is null or omitted on failure path
entries.fixMethod: Fail-closed callback: if error != null return immediately before any persist; error emitter must always pass non-null error to callback even when partial content exists

entries.problemPattern: Empty catch blocks swallow network/store/sync failures with no observability
entries.fixMethod: Log at warn with operation context; expose lastSyncError ref or bounded user toast after N consecutive failures; keep last-known-good UI state

entries.problemPattern: Global substring replace during refactor corrupts method definitions sharing the same identifier
entries.fixMethod: Extract shared helper on parent class first; replace call sites only; delete local private copies; run compile plus domain smoke test that exercises every registered entry

entries.problemPattern: Check-then-insert race creates duplicate rows under concurrent requests
entries.fixMethod: Add unique constraint where appropriate; wrap insert in try/catch DuplicateKeyException; re-select with brief retry (getOrCreate pattern)

entries.problemPattern: N+1 database queries when enriching list items with related entity names
entries.fixMethod: Collect foreign keys from result set, batch load with IN/batchIds, build id→entity map, enrich in memory
